---
title: "Miss Thompson"
---

## Miss Thompson

**Dates:** (fl.1879)

### Description

letter to about <i>images d’Épinal</i> and fairy stories

### Biography

It refers to the pictures produced by the Imagerie Pellerin at Épinal from the late eighteenth century.  The recipient may be Edith or Ellen Thompson.

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 18th 1878

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
